name: Aurora Desk Lamp
description: An adjustable aluminum desk lamp with warm and cool light modes for focused work and late-night reading.

name: Linen Notebook Set
description: A set of three cloth-bound notebooks with dotted paper, perfect for planning, sketching, or journaling.

name: Ripple Ceramic Mug
description: A hand-finished ceramic mug with a rippled grip and a generous capacity for coffee or tea.

name: Solstice Speaker
description: A compact wireless speaker with rich bass, USB-C charging, and 14 hours of battery life.

name: Wayfinder Backpack
description: A water-resistant 20L backpack with padded laptop sleeve, quick-access pockets, and hidden passport storage.

name: Glide Wireless Mouse
description: An ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, programmable buttons, and precision tracking.

name: Cove Cable Organizer
description: A modular cable tray and clip set that keeps chargers, hubs, and cords tucked neatly away.

name: Summit Water Bottle
description: A double-wall stainless steel bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12.

name: Drift Throw Blanket
description: A soft woven blanket with a breathable cotton blend and reversible tonal pattern.

name: Pulse Headphones
description: Over-ear noise-canceling headphones with plush memory foam cushions and fast charging.

name: Atlas Passport Wallet
description: A slim leather travel wallet with RFID blocking, boarding pass sleeve, and coin pocket.

name: Meadow Aroma Diffuser
description: A quiet ultrasonic diffuser with ambient glow, timer presets, and a matte ceramic finish.

name: Harbor Standing Desk
description: An oak-finish sit-stand desk with dual motors, cable ports, and three memory presets.

name: Ember Mechanical Keyboard
description: A low-profile mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches, gasket mount, and warm white backlighting.

name: Orbit Monitor Arm
description: A gas-spring monitor arm with hidden cable routing and a wide range of motion for ergonomic setups.

name: Arc Desk Pad
description: A vegan leather desk pad that protects surfaces and adds a smooth writing and mousing area.

name: Tidal Webcam Light
description: A clip-on streaming light with edge diffusion, adjustable color temperature, and touch controls.

name: Quill Pen Tray
description: A walnut catchall tray that keeps pens, AirPods, and cables in one tidy place.

name: Cedar Bookshelf
description: A slim five-shelf bookcase with rounded edges and adjustable feet for uneven floors.

name: Tidewall Art Print
description: A gallery-quality abstract print with soft ocean tones and heavyweight archival paper.

name: Mason Serving Board
description: A hand-oiled acacia serving board sized for cheese spreads, bread, and casual dinners.

name: Halo Floor Lamp
description: A sculptural floor lamp with a dimmable halo shade and slim brass stem.

name: Pebble Side Table
description: A compact powder-coated steel side table with a hidden handle for easy room-to-room moves.

name: Fern Planter Set
description: A trio of matte stoneware planters sized for herbs, succulents, and small tabletop plants.

name: Luma Bedside Carafe
description: A hand-blown glass carafe with nesting tumbler so cold water is always within reach.

name: Cloud Linen Sheet Set
description: A breathable washed-linen sheet set that gets softer with every laundry cycle.

name: Dusk Blackout Curtains
description: A pair of textured blackout curtains that soften daylight and support deeper sleep.

name: Frame Photo Set
description: A coordinated set of three oak frames with glass fronts for gallery wall arrangements.

name: Atlas Wall Clock
description: A silent-sweep wall clock with minimalist numerals and a softly brushed metal rim.

name: Echo Earbuds
description: Compact true wireless earbuds with transparency mode, six microphones, and fast pair support.

name: Ember Soundbar
description: A low-profile TV soundbar with HDMI ARC, dialogue enhancement, and room-filling output.

name: Prism Turntable
description: A belt-drive turntable with built-in phono preamp, anti-skate tuning, and acrylic platter.

name: Nova Microphone
description: A USB-C condenser microphone with tap-to-mute control and interchangeable pickup patterns.

name: Meridian Record Stand
description: A compact vinyl stand that displays a now-playing album while storing favorite records below.

name: Trail Weekender Bag
description: A structured canvas duffel with shoe compartment, trolley sleeve, and detachable shoulder strap.

name: Northstar Packing Cubes
description: A lightweight six-piece packing cube set with mesh tops and compression zippers.

name: Rover Luggage Tag
description: A durable luggage tag with privacy flap, steel loop, and bright colorways for easy spotting.

name: Skyline Toiletry Kit
description: A hanging travel organizer with clear compartments and a wipe-clean water-resistant lining.

name: Metro Crossbody Bag
description: A slim everyday crossbody with expandable gusset, key leash, and padded tablet sleeve.

name: Shore Passport Holder
description: A recycled nylon passport folio with card slots, pen loop, and zip pouch for loose currency.

name: Breeze Yoga Mat
description: A natural rubber yoga mat with alignment guides and a grippy top layer for hot classes.

name: Calm Weighted Eye Mask
description: A flaxseed-filled eye mask with washable cover for gentle pressure and evening wind-downs.

name: Spruce Resistance Bands
description: A five-band training set with door anchor, handles, and a travel pouch for compact workouts.

name: Zen Foam Roller
description: A medium-density textured roller designed to release tension after long days and hard sessions.

name: Hush White Noise Machine
description: A bedside sound machine with eight sleep tracks, warm night light, and simple tactile controls.

name: Cove Meditation Cushion

name: Ember Espresso Maker
description: A stovetop espresso maker with heat-resistant handle and polished stainless steel body.

name: Olive Oil Cruet
description: A ceramic countertop cruet with drip-free spout that keeps olive oil close while cooking.

name: Quartz Chef Knife
description: An 8-inch chef knife with full tang construction, balanced grip, and razor-sharp steel blade.

name: Willow Salad Bowl
description: A generously sized mango wood serving bowl with hand-rubbed finish and matching servers.

name: Coast Picnic Blanket
description: A roll-up picnic blanket with water-resistant base, woven top, and leather carry straps.

name: Ridge Camp Lantern
description: A rechargeable lantern with adjustable brightness, hanging hook, and long-lasting battery.

name: Shore Hammock
description: A portable hammock woven from quick-dry fabric with tree straps and compact stuff sack.

name: Summit Trekking Poles
description: A collapsible aluminum trekking pole pair with cork grips and carbide trail tips.

name: Cinder Firepit Table
description: A low-profile propane firepit table with lava rocks, weather cover, and hidden tank storage.
